2026-04-14T06:05:02.8866686Z ---
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8867108Z description: |
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8868615Z   Intelligent issue triage assistant that processes new issues
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8869622Z   Analyzes issue content, evaluates whether the author is a customer,
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8870494Z   predicts labels, looks up owners from CODEOWNERS, and provides
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8871335Z   analysis notes including debugging strategies and resource links
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8872190Z   Implements the initial issue triage rules for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8872743Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8872939Z on:
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8874587Z   issues:
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8875971Z     types: [opened]
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8876449Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8876897Z     inputs:
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8877292Z       issue_number:
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8878041Z         description: "Issue number to triage (used when dispatched from another workflow)"
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8879117Z         required: true
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8880124Z         type: string
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8881110Z   roles: all
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8881535Z   reaction: eyes
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8881808Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8882024Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8882321Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8882533Z network:
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8882936Z   allowed:
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8883332Z     - defaults
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8883768Z     - "api.nuget.org"
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8884056Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8884259Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8884706Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8885252Z   add-labels:
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8885652Z     max: 7
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8886037Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8886470Z   remove-labels:
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8886873Z     max: 7
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8887257Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8887671Z   add-comment:
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8888634Z     max: 2
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8889108Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8890203Z   assign-to-user:
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8890590Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8890936Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8891300Z   close-issue:
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8891650Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8891993Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8892352Z   noop:
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8892718Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8893143Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8893481Z     mention_owners:
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8894398Z       description: "Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization"
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8895403Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8896000Z       output: "Owner mention comment posted"
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8896507Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8896883Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8897259Z       inputs:
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8897613Z         message:
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8898165Z           description: "The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols"
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8899032Z           required: true
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8899445Z           type: string
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8899826Z         owners:
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8900681Z           description: "Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')"
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8901887Z           required: true
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8902324Z           type: string
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8902709Z       steps:
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8903187Z         - name: Post mention comment
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8903686Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8904169Z           env:
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8904718Z             DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}"
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8905372Z           with:
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8905735Z             script: |
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8906141Z               const fs = require('fs');
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8906704Z               const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8907111Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8907311Z               function resolveIssueNumber() {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8908023Z                 if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8909279Z                   return context.issue.number;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8909823Z                 }
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8910368Z                 const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8911095Z                 if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8911651Z                   return parsed;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8912089Z                 }
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8912459Z                 return null;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8912869Z               }
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8913080Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8913308Z               const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8913872Z               const owner = context.repo.owner;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8914410Z               const repo = context.repo.repo;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8914750Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8914930Z               if (issueNumber === null) {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8916290Z                 core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8917644Z                 return;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8918035Z               }
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8936658Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8936957Z               async function failSafe(reason) {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8937612Z                 core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8938485Z                 try {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8938971Z                   await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8939678Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8940262Z                     labels: ['needs-team-triage']
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8940775Z                   });
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8941250Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8941854Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8943174Z                     body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8944094Z                   });
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8944509Z                 } catch (recoveryError) {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8945156Z                   core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8945767Z                 }
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8946160Z                 core.setFailed(reason);
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8946638Z               }
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8946850Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8947028Z               if (!outputFile) {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8947564Z                 await failSafe('No agent output path provided');
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8948121Z                 return;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8948721Z               }
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8949143Z               if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8949801Z                 await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8950431Z                 return;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8950818Z               }
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8951029Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8951204Z               let agentOutput;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8951854Z               try {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8952405Z                 agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8953165Z               } catch (parseError) {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8953832Z                 await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8954510Z                 return;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8954893Z               }
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8955104Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8955374Z               if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8956057Z                 await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8956622Z                 return;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8956999Z               }
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8957212Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8957574Z               const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8958478Z               if (items.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8959089Z                 await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8991063Z                 return;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8991599Z               }
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8992952Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8993151Z               for (const item of items) {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8995006Z                 if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.8998016Z                   await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9008087Z                   return;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9009098Z                 }
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9009333Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9009530Z                 const mentions = item.owners
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9010059Z                   .split(/[\s,]+/)
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9010524Z                   .map(s => s.trim())
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9011010Z                   .filter(Boolean)
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9011466Z                   .map(raw => {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9012004Z                     const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\?@/, '');
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9012623Z                     if (/\r|\n/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9013324Z                     if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9013978Z                     return `@${normalized}`;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9014459Z                   })
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9014849Z                   .filter(Boolean);
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9015157Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9015345Z                 if (mentions.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9015984Z                   await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9016603Z                   return;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9017012Z                 }
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9017231Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9017417Z                 const body = item.message
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9017986Z                   ? `${item.message}\n\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9027187Z                   : mentions.join(' ');
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9027557Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9027717Z                 try {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9028463Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9029113Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9029644Z                     body
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9030054Z                   });
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9030753Z                   core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9031544Z                 } catch (apiError) {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9032222Z                   await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9032902Z                   return;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9033301Z                 }
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9033662Z               }
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9033873Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9034019Z tools:
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9034359Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9034717Z   github:
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9035067Z     toolsets: [issues]
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9036778Z     # Triage must read issues from all users, including external
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9037956Z     # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9060043Z     # auto-applied "approved" policy filters them out via DIFC
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9060684Z     min-integrity: none
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9060951Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9061122Z timeout-minutes: 10
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9061514Z ---

2026-04-14T06:05:02.9096820Z               const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9097231Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9097431Z               function resolveIssueNumber() {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9098149Z                 if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9099089Z                   return context.issue.number;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9099582Z                 }
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9100119Z                 const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9100830Z                 if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9101380Z                   return parsed;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9101814Z                 }
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9102183Z                 return null;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9102600Z               }
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9102809Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9103040Z               const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9103603Z               const owner = context.repo.owner;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9104156Z               const repo = context.repo.repo;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9104493Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9104678Z               if (issueNumber === null) {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9106026Z                 core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9107354Z                 return;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9107743Z               }
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9108046Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9108391Z               async function failSafe(reason) {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9108993Z                 core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9109535Z                 try {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9109984Z                   await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9110569Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9111131Z                     labels: ['needs-team-triage']
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9111626Z                   });
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9112080Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9112669Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9113869Z                     body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9114756Z                   });
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9115179Z                 } catch (recoveryError) {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9115814Z                   core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9116428Z                 }
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9116814Z                 core.setFailed(reason);
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9117278Z               }
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9117488Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9117660Z               if (!outputFile) {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9118358Z                 await failSafe('No agent output path provided');
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9118921Z                 return;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9119313Z               }
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9119714Z               if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9120368Z                 await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9120982Z                 return;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9121366Z               }
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9121585Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9121752Z               let agentOutput;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9122183Z               try {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9122839Z                 agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9123506Z               } catch (parseError) {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9124269Z                 await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9124948Z                 return;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9125343Z               }
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9125554Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9125827Z               if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9126509Z                 await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9127070Z                 return;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9127444Z               }
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9127655Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9128018Z               const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9128929Z               if (items.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9129534Z                 await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9130137Z                 return;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9130512Z               }
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9130730Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9130907Z               for (const item of items) {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9131592Z                 if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9132401Z                   await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9133012Z                   return;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9133413Z                 }
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9133626Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9133811Z                 const mentions = item.owners
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9134316Z                   .split(/[\s,]+/)
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9134773Z                   .map(s => s.trim())
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9135240Z                   .filter(Boolean)
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9135691Z                   .map(raw => {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9136186Z                     const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\?@/, '');
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9136795Z                     if (/\r|\n/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9137488Z                     if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9138145Z                     return `@${normalized}`;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9138796Z                   })
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9139186Z                   .filter(Boolean);
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9139489Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9139675Z                 if (mentions.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9140309Z                   await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9140928Z                   return;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9141329Z                 }
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9141543Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9141728Z                 const body = item.message
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9142287Z                   ? `${item.message}\n\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9142856Z                   : mentions.join(' ');
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9143170Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9143327Z                 try {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9143785Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9144402Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9144925Z                     body
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9145325Z                   });
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9146013Z                   core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9146789Z                 } catch (apiError) {
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9147800Z                   await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9148665Z                   return;
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9149063Z                 }
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9149426Z               }
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9149641Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9149791Z tools:
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9150137Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9150483Z   github:
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9150834Z     toolsets: [issues]
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9151345Z     # Triage must read issues from all users, including external
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9152214Z     # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9152927Z     # auto-applied "approved" policy filters them out via DIFC
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9153604Z     min-integrity: none
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9153853Z 
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9154014Z timeout-minutes: 10
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9154576Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9155251Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (6762 chars):
2026-04-14T06:05:02.9236506Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Intelligent issue triage assistant that processes new issues\n  Analyzes issue content, evaluates whether the author is a customer,\n  predicts labels, looks up owners from CODEOWNERS, and provides\n  analysis notes including debugging strategies and resource links\n  Implements the initial issue triage rules for the Azure SDK repository\n\non:\n  issues:\n    types: [opened]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n    inputs:\n      issue_number:\n        description: \"Issue number to triage (used when dispatched from another workflow)\"\n        required: true\n        type: string\n  roles: all\n  reaction: eyes\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork:\n  allowed:\n    - defaults\n    - \"api.nuget.org\"\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  add-labels:\n    max: 7\n    target: \"*\"\n  remove-labels:\n    max: 7\n    target: \"*\"\n  add-comment:\n    max: 2\n    target: \"*\"\n  assign-to-user:\n    max: 1\n    target: \"*\"\n  close-issue:\n    max: 1\n    target: \"*\"\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    mention_owners:\n      description: \"Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      output: \"Owner mention comment posted\"\n      permissions:\n        issues: write\n      inputs:\n        message:\n          description: \"The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols\"\n          required: true\n          type: string\n        owners:\n          description: \"Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')\"\n          required: true\n          type: string\n      steps:\n        - name: Post mention comment\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const fs = require('fs');\n              const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;\n\n              function resolveIssueNumber() {\n                if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {\n                  return context.issue.number;\n                }\n                const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);\n                if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {\n                  return parsed;\n                }\n                return null;\n              }\n\n              const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();\n              const owner = context.repo.owner;\n              const repo = context.repo.repo;\n\n              if (issueNumber === null) {\n                core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              async function failSafe(reason) {\n                core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);\n                try {\n                  await github.rest.issues.addLabels({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    labels: ['needs-team-triage']\n                  });\n                  await github.rest.issues.createComment({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'\n                  });\n                } catch (recoveryError) {\n                  core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);\n                }\n                core.setFailed(reason);\n              }\n\n              if (!outputFile) {\n                await failSafe('No agent output path provided');\n                return;\n              }\n              if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {\n                await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              let agentOutput;\n              try {\n                agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));\n              } catch (parseError) {\n                await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {\n                await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');\n              if (items.length === 0) {\n                await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              for (const item of items) {\n                if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {\n                  await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                const mentions = item.owners\n                  .split(/[\\s,]+/)\n                  .map(s => s.trim())\n                  .filter(Boolean)\n                  .map(raw => {\n                    const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\\\?@/, '');\n                    if (/\\r|\\n/.test(normalized)) return null;\n                    if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;\n                    return `@${normalized}`;\n                  })\n                  .filter(Boolean);\n\n                if (mentions.length === 0) {\n                  await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                const body = item.message\n                  ? `${item.message}\\n\\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`\n                  : mentions.join(' ');\n\n                try {\n                  await github.rest.issues.createComment({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    body\n                  });\n                  core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);\n                } catch (apiError) {\n                  await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);\n                  return;\n                }\n              }\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues]\n    # Triage must read issues from all users, including external\n    # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the\n    # auto-applied \"approved\" policy filters them out via DIFC\n    min-integrity: none\n\ntimeout-minutes: 10"}
